creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Seems solved:

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- Fontmap	Mon Jan 25 12:39:01 1999
|+++ Fontmap	Fri Jul 23 16:48:39 1999
--------------------------
Patching file /usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.27/Resource/Init/Fontmap.GS using Plan A...
Empty context always matches.
Hunk #1 succeeded at 350.
done

Builds fine.

I close here. If there are still problems, please reopen.
